name: Isilon Systems, Inc.
description: Isilon Systems, Inc. is a provider of scale-out file storage systems and dual-protocol network-attached storage (NAS) platforms. Founded in 2001 and headquartered in Seattle, Washington, the company designed and manufactured clustered storage systems for high-performance computing, file sharing, and big data storage. Isilon's OneFS operating system combined file system, volume manager, and data protection into a single unified software layer. The company was acquired by EMC Corporation in 2010 for approximately $2.25 billion and subsequently integrated into Dell EMC.
